title: Ritterocactus permutatus
taxonomy: Ritterocactus permutatus is classified under the family Cactaceae. This plant is part of the genus Ritterocactus, which is a group of cacti. The Cactaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 1,500 species. Ritterocactus permutatus is native to the Americas, and its classification is consistent with other species in the Cactaceae family. Further classification within the family may include the order Caryophyllales, which is a larger group of flowering plants.
